title: RememberRelationshipsInput
description: JSON array accepted by `sqlite-graphrag remember --relationships-file`. Each relationship must define source, target, canonical relation label, and strength. Stored graph outputs expose `strength` as `weight`.

relation.description: Canonical stored relation label with underscores. CLI flags on `link` and `unlink` use dashed spellings like `applies-to` and `tracked-in` instead.

strength.description: Relationship strength in the inclusive range [0.0, 1.0]. Mapped to the `weight` field in graph outputs.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the relationship.
